inputs.label: Upstream Mach Number
inputs.businessContext: Enter the Mach number before the shock (M1 > 1 for normal shock).

businessContext_i18n.en: Enter the Mach number before the shock (M1 > 1 for normal shock).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şok öncesi Mach sayısını girin (normal şok için M1 > 1).
businessContext_i18n.de: Geben Sie die Machzahl vor dem Stoß ein (M1 > 1 für senkrechten Stoß).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Entrez le nombre de Mach avant le choc (M1 > 1 pour un choc normal).
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingrese el número de Mach antes del choque (M1 > 1 para choque normal).

inputs.label: Specific Heat Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv), typically 1.4 for air.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of specific heats (Cp/Cv), typically 1.4 for air.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Özgül ısı oranı (Cp/Cv), tipik olarak hava için 1.4.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rapport des chaleurs spécifiques (Cp/Cv), typiquement 1,4 pour l'air.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación de calores específicos (Cp/Cv), típicamente 1.4 para el aire.

inputs.label: Upstream Static Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Absolute static pressure before shock (optional for absolute values).

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute static pressure before shock (optional for absolute values).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şok öncesi mutlak statik basınç (mutlak değerler için isteğe bağlı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Absoluter statischer Druck vor dem Stoß (optional für Absolutwerte).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pression statique absolue avant le choc (optionnel pour les valeurs absolues).
businessContext_i18n.es: Presión estática absoluta antes del choque (opcional para valores absolutos).

inputs.label: Upstream Static Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Absolute static temperature before shock (optional for absolute values).

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute static temperature before shock (optional for absolute values).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Şok öncesi mutlak statik sıcaklık (mutlak değerler için isteğe bağlı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Absolute statische Temperatur vor dem Stoß (optional für Absolutwerte).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Température statique absolue avant le choc (optionnel pour les valeurs absolues).
businessContext_i18n.es: Temperatura estática absoluta antes del choque (opcional para valores absolutos).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
